message:
refactor: clippy and lint fixes across fwc and fcp-protocol

Small cleanup pass driven by clippy suggestions and code review:

- policy_cmd.rs: prefix unused variable with underscore (_bundle_a)
  in validate_rollback_transition_invalid test
- cual_fixtures.rs: add #[allow(clippy::struct_excessive_bools)] on
  InstallVerificationFixture, promote value_type_name to const fn,
  replace VecDeque::from_iter with idiomatic .collect::<VecDeque<_>>()
- cual_integration.rs: use inline format args (args:?} instead of
  positional {:?} with trailing args)
- fcps.rs: remove unused imports (SchemaId, Provenance, Version) in
  decode_status_validates_hint_bounds test, remove unnecessary .clone()
  calls on Copy-type zone_id in symbol request and decode status tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
